Headline: #63 63rd Temporary Reroute near 63rd Street Beach
ShortDescription: #63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding. Allow extra travel time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #82 Kimball/Homan Temporary Reroute at Homan/Lake
ShortDescription: 82 Kimball/Homan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Homan/Lake.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#82 Kimball/Homan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Homan, Franklin, Kedzie, Madison, Homan, then over normal route, due to street blockage near Homan/Lake.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #43 43rd Temporary Westbound Reroute near 43rd/Vincennes
ShortDescription: WB 43 43rd buses are temporarily rerouted via 43rd, Vincennes, Oakwood, King Drive, 43rd and over regular route, due to street blockage near 43rd/Vincennes.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #43 43rd buses are temporarily rerouted via 43rd, Vincennes, Oakwood, King Drive, 43rd and over regular route, due to street blockage near 43rd/Vincennes.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: 95th-bound Red Line Delays
ShortDescription: 95th-bound Red Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier door problem at Clark/Division. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
95th-bound Red Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier door problem at Clark/Division. 

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
